message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Service

box "Access token guard"
participant "Access token guard" as ATG
end box

box "Auth microservice" #YellowGreen
participant "Session module" as SM
participant "Auth module" as AM
end box

Service -> ATG : request
ATG -> ATG : get headers
ATG -> ATG : check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
    ATG -->> Service : 401
end

ATG <- SM : get access token from header
ATG -> AM : validate access token
ATG <- AM : result of validation

alt [Access token is Invalid]
    ATG -->> Service : 401
end

ATG -> AM : get embedded client id from access token
AM -> AM : extract id

alt [Client id is missing]
    ATG <- AM : error
    ATG -->> Service : 401
end

ATG <- AM : client id
ATG -> ATG : modify request with client id
ATG -->> Service : modified request

@enduml
```
